expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 是整体尺寸，[板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧面板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng itaas, ibaba, at gilid ng tabla, ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng likod ng tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: တည်ဆောက်တောင်ကြံတပ်, ၎င်းများ၏အတိအကျဆုံးအတိုင်း တိုင်းတာချက်များ, [အထူကွင်းစီးနှင့်ဖုံးထား။],[ဘောင်အစိတ်အပိုင်းနှင့်ပေါင်းစည်းမှုအကျင့်များ] [ပစ္စည်းပေါက်အထူ,ခြောက်ခြင်းပြုဖြစ်မှု] (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអ៊ីណានិកបាយស្មូនខ្លួនការចាប់អារម្មណ៍ (AI translated)
remarks.lo: ຄົ້ນຫາຮ້ານເດີນຫຼັກຟາສສឭນ້ (AI translated)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのためのカットサイズを計算します。[幅], [高さ], [奥行き]は全体の寸法で、[板厚]は上部、下部、側面の板の厚さ、[背面板の厚さ]は背面板の材質の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height],[Depth]은 전체 측정값이며, [BoardThick]은 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드의 재질 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]은 배경 보드의 재질 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height],[Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height],[Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet Brettgrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height],[Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialdicke von Ober-, Unter- und Seitenbrettern, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialdicke des Hintergrundbretts. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड आकार गणना करता है। [Width], [Height],[Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height],[Depth] — общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой досок, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
